creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi! 

I've looked into this report several times, but without ability to 
reproduce the problem I can't do much. 

I'd recommend to: 

1. Upgrade to the latest version of the port(try both samba3 and 
samba32) and see, if the problem still persists.  2. File the bug at the 
https://bugzilla.samba.org/ as my knowledge of Samba internals is very 
limited and developers could help you much better in such a case. 

With regards, Timur.
